chrome.signInIntro: Sign in to follow venues and manage notifications.

auth.resetSentBody: If an account exists for {email}, we've sent a link to reset your password. Open it to choose a new one.
auth.resetBody: Enter your account email and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
auth.confirmSentBody: We've sent a confirmation link to {email}. Open it to confirm your account — you'll come straight back here, signed in.

errors.enterEmailPassword: Enter your email and a password.
errors.passwordMin: Use a password of at least 8 characters.
errors.signInFailed: Couldn't sign you in. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.startSignInFailed: Couldn't start sign-in. Please try again.
errors.enterEmailForReset: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
errors.invalidLogin: That email or password doesn't match.
errors.alreadyRegistered: That email already has an account — try signing in instead.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.fallback: Couldn't complete that. Please check your details and try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.signedOutIntro: Sign in to manage your account settings.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.deleteBody: Permanently deletes your profile, posts, plans, chats and follows. This can't be undone.
danger.modalBody: This permanently removes your profile, posts, plans, chats, follows and saved offers. It can't be undone. Comments you left on others' walls stay, but no longer show your name.
danger.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete your account. Please try again.

language.title: Language
language.label: App language
language.hint: More languages are on the way. Posts and community content stay in the language they were written in — your browser can translate those.

handle.label: Handle
handle.empty: Choose a handle — it's your profile's web address.
handle.hint: Lowercase letters, numbers and underscores. This is your profile's web address.

profileEditor.bioPlaceholder: A line about you and the places you love.

errors.saveFailedRetry: Couldn't save your profile. Please try again.

accountHub.title: Your account
accountHub.signedOutIntro: Sign in to set up your profile and post to your wall.

notificationCenter.title: Notifications
notificationCenter.signedOutIntro: Sign in to see your notifications.
notificationCenter.empty: Nothing yet. When people reply to you, comment on your posts, or follow a venue you own, it'll show up here.

enableNotifications.signedOutIntro: Sign in to turn on notifications on this device.
enableNotifications.title: Notifications
enableNotifications.body: Get a heads-up on this device when venues you follow post something new.
enableNotifications.unsupported: This browser doesn't support web notifications.
enableNotifications.registered: This device is registered. You can manage delivery per venue by following them.

resetPassword.expiredBody: Your reset link is invalid or has already been used. Request a new one from the sign-in screen.
resetPassword.doneBody: Your password has been changed and you're signed in. You can head back to your account now.
resetPassword.chooseBody: Choose a new password for your account.

firstRun.title: Welcome to Roam
firstRun.intro: Two quick things so friends recognise you — and so the places you follow can send you a birthday treat.
firstRun.treatsOptIn: Send me birthday treats from places I follow
firstRun.privacyNote: Your birthday is private — businesses never see the date. It's only used to send the treats you've opted into. You can change any of this later in Settings.
firstRun.dobInvalid: That date of birth doesn't look right — please check it and try again.

birthdaySettings.title: Birthday & offers
birthdaySettings.treatsOptIn: Send me birthday treats from places I follow
birthdaySettings.privacyNote: Your birthday is private. Businesses never see it — it's only used to send you the birthday offers you've opted into, from places you already follow. You can clear it or turn this off anytime.

pushHistory.loadFailed: Couldn't load push history just now.
pushHistory.empty: No pushes sent yet. When you post an update and tick “Notify followers”, it'll appear here.

authCallback.failedBody: We couldn't finish signing you in — you may have cancelled, or the link expired. Please try again.

recentChats.title: Recent chats
recentChats.nudge: Sign in to see your conversations and plans with people nearby.
recentChats.error: Couldn't load your chats just now.
recentChats.empty: No chats yet. Message a friend or open a plan to start one — it'll show up here.

trending.title: Trending nearby
trending.error: Couldn't load venues near you just now.

townForum.title: Town forum
townForum.error: Couldn't load the forum just now.

savedDeals.title: Saved deals
savedDeals.empty: Deals you save will appear here, ready to redeem in-venue.

followed.title: Followed venues
followed.nudge: Follow a business to unlock its exclusive loyalty deals — they'll appear here, just for followers.
followed.error: Couldn't load your followed venues just now.
followed.empty: You're not following any businesses yet. Follow one to get its exclusive loyalty deals here.
followed.noDeals: No live deals from your venues right now — we'll show them here the moment one posts a loyalty offer.

plans.title: Your plans
plans.nudge: Make plans — a night out, a weekend, a list to try — and save venues to them.
plans.error: Couldn't load your plans just now.
plans.empty: No plans yet — start one and add venues from anywhere on Roam.

market.title: {place} market
market.body: Buy, sell and swap with people in your town — list something in a minute, agree in chat, meet locally.

homeFeed.title: Your local feed
homeFeed.error: Couldn't load your feed just now.
homeFeed.followingNudge: Sign in and follow your favourite local businesses — their news, offers and events land here.
homeFeed.emptyFollowing: No posts from venues you follow yet — follow a few on Explore and their updates will land here.
homeFeed.emptyLocal: Nothing moving in {place} just yet — check back soon, or be the one who starts something in the Town Hall.

homeCustomize.title: Customise home
homeCustomize.subtitle: Drag the handle to reorder, or hide the sections you see.

basecamp.title: Basecamp
basecamp.intro: Your Roam, your way — everything in

placeSwitcher.searchError: Couldn't search just now. Try again.
placeSwitcher.geoError: Couldn't get your location. Pick a place instead.

suggested.title: Suggested for you
suggested.intro: Tailored offer and post ideas — review and edit each one before it goes out.
suggested.published: Published — find it in Offers above to tweak or add a code.

nearbyDepartures.title: Nearby departures
nearbyDepartures.noDepartures: No departures in the next while.

comingSoon.title: Local transit
comingSoon.body: Live bus & train departures for {place} are on the way — powered by Translink, across Ireland.

birthdayOffer.intro: Set a treat and we'll deliver it automatically to followers on their birthday — the ones who've opted in. You never see whose birthday it is, only how many were sent.
birthdayOffer.redeemedPct: {pct}% of birthday treats have been redeemed.
birthdayOffer.detailsPlaceholder: Show this message in-venue on your birthday to claim.

explore.venuesInView: {count, plural, one {# venue in view} other {# venues in view}}

gate.title: Create a free account to keep exploring
gate.body: You've explored {limit} searched locations this session — the free limit. Your own location stays free; sign up to open {placeName} and anywhere else, save places, and follow the venues you love.

empty.title: Nothing here yet
empty.body: No venues match this view. Try another category or place, or check back as Roam grows in your area.

posts.empty: No posts yet — when this venue posts news, offers or events they'll show here.

offers.empty: No live offers right now — check back, or follow to be notified.

claim.intro: Claiming is free. Sign in or create an account and this venue is yours to manage right away.
claim.ownerBody: Claim it free to add photos, opening times, your menu and links, and post offers and events to people nearby — about 90 seconds, and you can start editing straight away.
claim.knowBody: Help fellow locals — suggest a photo, the opening hours, or a fix.
claim.submittedBody: Thanks — your claim is now with us for verification. Once it's approved you'll be able to manage this venue, add photos and details, and post to people nearby.
claim.underReviewBody: A claim for this venue has been submitted and is being verified. Check back soon — once it's approved the venue's owner can keep its details up to date.

notFound.title: Venue not found
notFound.body: This venue may have been removed, or the link is wrong.

localPosts.empty: No posts yet. Share news, an offer or an event — it appears on your venue page and in your town's local news feed.

composer.addSomething: Add a title, some text or a photo to post.
composer.insufficientCredits: Not enough push credits to notify followers. Untick “Notify followers” to post without a push.
composer.postFailedRetry: Couldn't post that. Please try again.
composer.footer: Appears on your venue page and in your town's local news feed.

media.signInToAdd: You need to be signed in to add images.

deals.title: Deals
deals.intro: Handpicked offers and voucher codes from brands we partner with. Links marked Ad may earn Roam a commission — it never changes the price you pay.
deals.affiliateAdTitle: Affiliate link — Roam may earn a commission
deals.affiliateLinksTitle: Affiliate links — Roam may earn a commission
deals.emptyBody: Fresh offers from our partner brands will appear here soon — check back shortly.

detail.loadFailed: Couldn't load this deal just now.
detail.notFoundBody: This offer may have ended — fresh deals are on the deals page.

offerCard.signInToRedeem: Sign in to redeem this offer.
offerCard.soldOut: This offer has been fully redeemed.
offerCard.redeemFailed: Couldn't redeem just now — please try again.

venueOffers.empty: No offers yet. Publish an exclusive deal — your followers get notified, and anyone can save and redeem it in-venue.

composer.titlePlaceholder: Offer — e.g. 20% off your first coffee

hero.title: Town Hall
hero.body: What locals are talking about right now. Ask a question, share a tip, or upvote what matters where you are.

townHall.signInToStart: Sign in to start a topic in {place}.

empty.title: No topics in {place} yet
empty.body: Be the first to start a conversation — ask a question, share a recommendation, or suggest something.

townHall.helpfulVotes: {count, plural, one {# helpful vote} other {# helpful votes}}

composer.title: New topic in {place}
composer.titlePlaceholder: Title — e.g. Best Sunday roast around here?

townHallTopic.notFoundBody: It may have been removed, or the link is wrong.
townHallTopic.replies: {count, plural, =0 {No replies yet} one {# reply} other {# replies}}
townHallTopic.signInToReply: Sign in to join the conversation.

report.thanks: Thanks — a moderator will take a look.

tagFeed.postCount: {count, plural, one {# post} other {# posts}} across Roam
tagFeed.emptyBody: Use #{tag} in a Town Hall topic or a wall post and it'll show up here.

profileWall.notFoundBody: This account may have been removed, or the link is wrong.

empty.ownerBody: Share your first post, or follow a few venues and friends to fill your feed.

composer.maxItems: You can add up to {max} items.

empty.title: The feed for {placeName} is just getting started
empty.body: When venues here post news, offers and events, they'll appear in this feed. Browse what's nearby in the meantime — and if you run a place in {placeName}, claiming it lets you post to people close by.

when.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

screen.notFoundBody: It may have been removed, or the link is wrong.

wallPostScreen.notFoundBody: It may have been removed, or the link is wrong.
